name: TC_NFR5 – Soft Delete User Account
description: Verify that the soft-delete endpoint PATCH /api/v1/users/{user_id} meets performance requirements under a concurrent load of 50 simultaneous account deactivation requests.
preconditions: Test users must exist and be in "active" status.
Authorization token is required for each request.
Users must not have pending transactions that prevent deletion.
notes: Post-test: verify deactivated users do not appear in GET /api/v1/users/active.
Each JMeter thread must carry a valid bearer token before sending the PATCH request.
